name: EuiFieldPassword
description: Password input field with optional visibility toggle.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

fullWidth.description:
Expand to fill 100% of the parent.
Defaults to `fullWidth` prop of `<EuiForm>`.

prepend.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming before input.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

append.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming after input.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

type.description:
Change the `type` of input for manually handling obfuscation.
The `dual` option adds the ability to toggle the obfuscation of the input by
adding an icon button as the first `append` element

dualToggleProps.description: Additional props to apply to the dual toggle. Extends EuiButtonIcon
